llm_instruction: Use this small file for country-and-function-specific matching. Copy job URLs exactly. Never construct basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Assistant Manager - Technical Development Flexible PU
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position: To support customers and Technical Sales (Services and development) on technical solutions through technical development and drive PMU Projects. Identifying customer needs and opportunities in the field of PU Systems through Technical Development. PU system development, optimization/fine-tuning, Handling customer complaints, trials at customer end and coordinating with Technical Service for developments and quality complaints, etc Main Tasks: Technical Development in South Asia (India) Identify and develop new applications for PM portfolio in Polyurethane systems in the field of Flexible Polyurethane foam (Automotive and Furniture Industry). To carry out in-house trials and approval for new systems, and to maintain comprehensive documentation of all developments and trials. To assist in setting and reviewing specifications for the quality control of all new/existing systems developed. Pursue customer-driven innovations / New applications and manage joint development projects with full accountability. Contribute to the development of the business strategy by ensuring appropriate information flow. Owns the Standard operating procedure, lab equipment mainte

jobs.title: Site Controller
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position: This position is required to guide, challenge and advise the organization towards economic decision-making and value generation. Ensure that financial practices align with the overall corporate strategy while also adhering to local regulations and standards. Enforce compliance with financial policies and procedures. To facilitate the site management in steering the business and evaluating the costs in the legal entity. Develops financial competencies, partnering with key site functions and business, systems and reports to help improve performance, in respect of rules standards to ensure full compliance. This position will be based in Thane and Vikhroli - incumbent is required to travel between these two lcoations as and when required. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities: Prepare Business Reports (Site Management inclusive) and maintain BASF Applications: Prepare and present accurate financial statements and reports to senior management. Monitor and ensure compliance with accounting principles and standards Reports prepared punctually and accurately Key Performance Indicators (KPIs): Product Costing report Sales Performance Overview: Role as

jobs.title: Technical Service Lab Executive
jobs.description: About The Role We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Technical Service Lab Executive to join our laboratory team. The ideal candidate will support product testing, customer complaint analysis, formulation support, and technical service activities. This role involves hands-on lab work, data interpretation, and collaboration with cross-functional teams including sales, production, and quality. How You Will Do It Conduct routine and non-routine laboratory analyses on raw materials, intermediates, and finished products. Support technical service requests by performing application studies, product evaluations, and performance testing. Assist in troubleshooting customer issues and providing analytical reports and recommendations. Develop and optimize test methods, formulations, and application procedures as required. Maintain accurate documentation of experiments, test results, calibration logs, and lab reports. Ensure compliance with lab safety practices, ISO standards, and internal SOPs. Handle laboratory instruments such as GC, HPLC, UV-Vis, FTIR, viscometers, titrators, pH meters, etc. (Exposure preferred; training will be provided for freshers.) Prepare technical presentati

jobs.title: Deputy Manager- Technical Service - Personal Care
jobs.description: About The Role Technical key account management and key interface of customers R D Translate the customer needs into technical projects briefing Drive Technical service projects delivery with business impact How You Will Do It 1. Technical Interface Application Development Serve as the gatekeeper for all R D and technical exchanges between customers and BASF. Develop appropriate solutions in lab and present technical proposals, new concepts, and application ideas tailored to customer needs. Support implementation of these solutions at customer sites through trials, formulation guidance, and troubleshooting. Provide technical consulting, training, and hands-on support to customers. 2. Technical Service Strategy Innovation Develop and execute proactive technical service strategies that enhance long-term customer loyalty. Identify customer-driven innovation opportunities and emerging application fields specific to Personal Care. Lead joint development projects with customers, ensuring strong project management and full accountability for deliverables. Manage and mitigate product and process risks, ensuring compliance with technical and regulatory standards. 3. Technical Key Account Ma

jobs.title: Production Executive
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position: As a designated Shift Supervisor, takes responsibility of Safety, Production, Quality of System House plant in the shifts. Main Tasks: Coordinate and manage production in shift with consistent Quality and Safety as per the target. Manage the manpower planning in the shift. (Employee and Contractor) Continuous improvement of processes in coordination with the Plant Manager and his Deputy Quality control to reduce batch cycle times, increase in yields, increase operational ease and ultimately leading to cost effective production. Whenever required, Coordinate with Supply chain and logistics team for adherence of production schedule and share the information to the team of change if any. Guiding a group of Operators in the plant continuously to ensure consistent product quality and safety. Implement Safety, Health and Environment system of the plant concerning man and equipment. Update knowledge and share the information of any change through proper channel. Ensure that discharge parameters of all the emissions in the plant are within the statutory limits and health and hygiene of the plant personnel is well maintained in the shifts. jobs.title: Production Executive
jobs.description: About The Role According to the Plant / Production Manager’s direction and plant production guidance, implement the correct production procedures by and assigning duties to the Senior Chemist Junior Chemist and directing their activities to ensure the production completed timely in quality and quantity. How You Will Do It Supervise production Coordinate and monitor the whole process, schedule, priorities of production in shift and respond to any deviations required arising out of the reports (e.g. shift production performance, quality report from lab, quality control department) by effective corrective actions. Set and continuously update production schedules and regulate work flow to ensure maximum use of machinery / equipment capacity and utility supply at minimum costs and fulfill daily/ weekly/ monthly production plan, including trial production. Ensure optimal use of resources to meet the demand Coordinate with Warehouse Team for timely receiving Raw material as per pull list and timely dispatch of Finished Goods from Plant. Coordination with Maintenance Interface with maintenance personnel to expedite correction of non-conformances to prevent and minimize the interruption of

jobs.title: Assistant Manager  - Production
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position Responsibility of Technical, Quality and cost-effective manufacturing of Dispersions Operations. It also involves plant and process safety, Health and Environmental activities related to the plant and personnel working in the plant. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Coordinate and manage production in shift with consistent quality as per the target. Continuous improvement of processes in coordination with the Head – Dispersions Plant Quality control to reduce batch cycle times, increase in yields, increase operational ease and ultimately leading to cost effective production. Guiding a group of Officers / Operators in the plant continuously to ensure product quality of international standard. Implement Safety, Health and Environment system of the plant concerning man and equipment. Update knowledge regarding product through proper channel. Ensuring proper maintenance of all the norms as per the departmental operating procedures of ISO 9001, ISO 14001 ISO 50001. Act as incident/emergency controller during the emergencies in shifts after office hours. Guide shop floor personnel towards SHE (Safety, Health and Environment) /Responsible care /c

Coordinating and monitoring the production as per the decided norms, under the directions of Production Manager. Ensuring smooth functioning of production plant by coordinating with required support and service functions. Coordinate with Production Manager to drive improvement projects Implement and Maintain 5S at Workplace Main Tasks: Related to Production Monitor Process flow, Capacity Utilization, Safety at workplace, Down times due to Breakdowns and Availability of Resources for achieving required productivity.
